hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test
hooks.statusMessage: Running clippy and tests before commit...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.rs$' && cargo fmt -- "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
